report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides covering ZKML (Zero-Knowledge Machine Learning) and AI Agent Identity/Non-Human Identity infrastructure — two of the hottest crypto narratives in March 2026.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: ZKML (Zero-Knowledge Machine Learning): ZK proofs verifying ML model inference without revealing weights or input data. Key projects: ezkl, Giza (StarkNet), World's Remainder prover, circomlib-ml, zkPyTorch (VGG-16 proofs in 2.2s), Lagrange DeepProve. ZKML + FHE fusion is the 'holy grail' of privacy in 2026. Costs dropping below $0.001/proof, making verified inference standard for APIs > $0.01/call.

AI Agent Identity & Non-Human Identity (NHI): NHIs outnumber human employees 96-to-1 in financial services. World launched AgentKit with Coinbase x402 protocol for agent identity verification. Know Your Agent (KYA) emerging as standard for cryptographically signed agent credentials. Agent economy bottleneck shifting from intelligence to identity. Machine-to-machine payments migrating to stablecoins via x402 (backed by Cloudflare, Circle, AWS, Stripe).

sections.title: Content Created
items: ZKML Guide 2026 (860 lines, ~3200 words, 14 min read): 9 sections covering what ZKML is, why it matters, technical overview, comparison table (ZKML vs FHE vs TEE), 6 key projects, real-world use cases, ZKML+FHE convergence, challenges, and 6 FAQs

AI Agent Identity & NHI Guide (768 lines, ~3000 words, 14 min read): 10 sections covering NHIs in crypto, why agents need identity, agent economy shift, key protocols (World AgentKit, x402, DIDs, ENS), KYA standards, M2M payments, security risks, DeFi implications, open questions, and 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: ZKML Guide: Title 'ZKML Guide 2026: Zero-Knowledge Machine Learning Explained | degen0x' (57 chars), target keyword 'ZKML zero-knowledge machine learning', Article + FAQ structured data schemas, 5 internal links

NHI Guide: Title 'AI Agent Identity & Non-Human Identity (NHI) in Crypto 2026 | degen0x', target keyword 'AI agent identity non-human identity crypto', Article + FAQ structured data schemas, 6 internal links
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts as batch 11
